examples: She was stoking the stove with sticks of maple.
The Cup was won for the third consecutive year by the Toronto Maple Leafs.
He dug a hole in our yard on Edgerton Avenue to plant a maple tree when I was born.
The roofs of the stately wood buildings with detailed carvings sprouted from clusters of gingko and maple trees.
The collapse was near complete before the Maple Leafs had one of epic proportions.
